holdings.infoBox: INRO is an equity ETF with a total of 238 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.29%, NVIDIA at 7.42%, Microsoft at 4.33%, Amazon.com at 4.13%, and Alphabet at 2.96%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Industry Rotation Active ETF (INRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of US equities. The portfolio rotates towards industries that BlackRock believes are best positioned for outperformance INRO was launched on Mar 26, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
